wins.event: Q3 revenue $13.1B, +47% YoY; FY 2024 guide raised to $51.5B from $51B
FY 2024 AI revenue raised to $12B from $11B; Q4 AI guide $3.5B+
Custom AI accelerators +3.5x YoY; Ethernet switching +4x YoY; non-AI semi bottomed
VMware ABV $2.5B (+32% sequential); spending down to $1.3B from $1.6B in Q2
Q4 guide $14B (+51% YoY); EBITDA target raised to 61.5% for FY

risks.event: Broadband -49% YoY; Q4 expected -40%+ YoY; recovery only in 2025
Industrial resales -31% YoY; only modest sequential recovery expected
Server storage -25% YoY despite sequential improvement

guidance.notes: FY 2024 raised to $51.5B from $51B; AI to $12B from $11B; EBITDA to 61.5%. Non-AI declared to have bottomed. Q4 guide $14B, +51% YoY.

_notes: Multiple guidance raises (revenue, AI, EBITDA). Non-AI cyclical bottom called. CEO confident; broadband still weak but recovery in 2025.
